name: It's too Quiet - Alto Clef
description:
Colleagues turned to  something more. You have been having a hard time falling asleep for a while now, and so, you were sitting on the couch in the lounge room.

Dr. Alto Clef of the SCP Foundation. (Link to Dr. Clef's Personnel File <--)

I am not 100% sure I cited correctly T^T but I highly recommend checking out the wikki!
